title: cordyloblaste sessilis
intro: Cordyloblaste sessilis, a type of fungus, is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Polyporaceae. It is used in traditional medicine in China for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cordyloblaste sessilis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and potentially alleviate symptoms of cancer and other diseases. Cordyloblaste sessilis is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be found in capsule or powder form as a dietary supplement.
